# Dane Auto Parts Ltd

> Canada's source for OEM-grade collision and auto body parts. 319,910 SKUs covering vehicles from 1961 to 2026. Ships to Canada, USA, and Mexico.

## Key Pages

- `Home -> https://daneauto.ca/`: Vehicle Year/Make/Model search, featured products, categories
- `Shop -> https://daneauto.ca/shop`: Full product catalog with vehicle and product-line filters
- `Categories -> https://daneauto.ca/categories`: Browse by product line (bumpers, fenders, lamps, doors, etc.)
- `Blog -> https://daneauto.ca/blog`: Parts guides, how-tos, and industry resources
- `FAQ -> https://daneauto.ca/faq`: Ordering, shipping, fitment, returns, and payment questions
- `Request a Part -> https://daneauto.ca/request-a-part`: Submit a request for parts not in catalog
- `About -> https://daneauto.ca/about`: Company info, 319,910 parts in catalog, collision/body parts specialty
- `Contact -> https://daneauto.ca/contact`: Contact form, Winnipeg MB Canada location
- `Shipping & Returns -> https://daneauto.ca/shipping-returns`: Rates, delivery times, return policy, warranty
- `Privacy Policy -> https://daneauto.ca/privacy-policy`: PIPEDA-compliant Canadian privacy policy

## Key Facts

- 319,910 auto parts in catalog
- Specializes in collision and body parts (93% of catalog)
- Vehicle coverage: 1961 to 2026
- Ships to Canada, USA, and Mexico
- Free shipping on Canadian orders $75+ CAD; flat $9.99 under $75
- Secure checkout in CAD via Stripe
- Parts include: head lamps, tail lamps, bumper covers, fenders, hoods, doors, mirrors, grilles, radiator supports, quarter panels, trunk lids
- Many parts are CAPA-certified (independently verified to meet OEM fit, finish, and safety standards)
- OEM and Partslink cross-references on every listing
- Based in Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada
- Address: 1000 Henry Ave, Winnipeg, MB R3E 3L2
- Phone: 1-(204) 599-4562
- Email: sales@daneauto.ca
- Hours: Mon–Fri 8AM–6PM CT, Sat 9AM–4PM CT
- 1-year limited warranty on all parts against defects in materials and workmanship
- 30-day returns on unused parts in original packaging
